about.title: Industrial Excellence since 2016
about.subtitle: A major player in the Moroccan industrial sector, based in Marrakech
about.description1: Since 2016, ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE has established itself as a reference partner in the Moroccan industrial sector. Based in Marrakech, we operate throughout the country with a team of highly qualified engineers and technicians.
about.description2: Our expertise covers a wide range of industrial services: metal construction, precision machining, industrial maintenance, industrial electricity, plastics, as well as textile and food processing sectors.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.2016_desc: ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE founded in Marrakech with a clear vision: industrial excellence
timeline.2018_desc: Development of industrial maintenance and electrical activities
timeline.2020_desc: Integration of plastics, food processing and textile sectors
timeline.2024_desc: 500+ projects completed, 200+ loyal clients throughout Morocco

services.title: Complete Industrial Solutions
services.subtitle: Multi-sector expertise to meet all your industrial needs
services.metallic_desc: Design and fabrication of custom metal structures: frames, industrial hangars, production halls, gates and fences. Turnkey delivery to your specifications.
services.machining_desc: Manufacturing of precision mechanical parts by turning, milling and grinding. Industrial tooling and prototyping for all industries. Micrometric tolerance guaranteed.
services.maintenance_desc: Preventive and corrective maintenance of your industrial equipment. Customized maintenance plans, complete overhauls and emergency interventions available 24/7.
services.electrical_desc: Installation and maintenance of industrial electrical systems: HTA/LTA panels, wiring, automation, variable speed drives, industrial lighting and electrical safety.
services.plastics_desc: Plastic transformation solutions: injection, extrusion, thermoforming. Custom plastic parts and components manufacturing for industry according to your plans.
services.agro_desc: Specialized industrial support for the textile and food processing sectors: stainless steel equipment, installations compliant with sanitary standards and dedicated maintenance.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A rigorous methodology for excellence results
process.step1_desc: In-depth study of your project, definition of objectives and precise specifications to guarantee a perfectly tailored response to your expectations.
process.step2_desc: Design and sizing by our engineers, detailed plans, material selection and precise budget estimation. Complete technical documentation provided.
process.step3_desc: Project execution by our qualified teams with the most modern equipment, in strict compliance with applicable safety standards.
process.step4_desc: Rigorous verification of each stage, performance testing and conformity certification according to applicable international standards.
process.step5_desc: Handover of installations on agreed deadlines, team training and post-delivery follow-up ensured for your total and lasting satisfaction.

portfolio.title: Projects Completed with Excellence
portfolio.subtitle: Discover some of our landmark projects throughout Morocco
portfolio.p1_desc: Construction of a 2000m² industrial hangar with metal frame, roofing and cladding for an automotive production unit.
portfolio.p2_desc: Complete installation of an HTA/LTA transformation station with electrical distribution, automation and industrial monitoring system.
portfolio.p3_desc: Annual preventive maintenance contract for a textile factory: overhaul of 50 production machines with worn parts replacement.
portfolio.p4_desc: Installation of a complete food processing production line with certified stainless steel equipment and automated CIP cleaning system.
portfolio.p5_desc: Design and fabrication of an XXL motorized sliding gate and perimeter fencing for securing an industrial zone.
portfolio.p6_desc: Complete overhaul of 8 industrial compressors with worn parts replacement, calibration and certified performance testing.
portfolio.p7_desc: Construction of a 5000m² logistics warehouse with metal mezzanines, loading docks and industrial ventilation system.
portfolio.p8_desc: Complete electrical wiring of an industrial unit: cable trays, junction boxes, connections and commissioning.
portfolio.p9_desc: Construction of an 800m³ industrial cold room with polyurethane insulation, refrigeration unit and automatic supervision.

whyus.title: Industrial Excellence at Your Service
whyus.subtitle: Solid reasons to choose ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE as your trusted partner
whyus.experience_desc: Since 2016, we have built solid expertise with hundreds of successful industrial projects throughout Morocco.
whyus.team_desc: Certified engineers and technicians, constantly trained in the latest cutting-edge industrial technologies and methods.
whyus.deadline_desc: Contractual commitment to deadlines with real-time tracking and regular reporting to keep you informed at every stage.
whyus.custom_desc: Every project is unique. We develop personalized solutions precisely adapted to your constraints and objectives.
whyus.technology_desc: Latest generation equipment and software to guarantee precision, quality and efficiency on all our industrial sites.
whyus.support_desc: Technical hotline available 24/7. Emergency intervention within 4 hours for clients under maintenance contract.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Our clients' satisfaction is our greatest reward and our greatest pride
testimonials.t1_text: ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE completed the metal frame for our new production hall on time and with impeccable quality. Exemplary professionalism from start to finish. I recommend without hesitation.
testimonials.t2_text: We have been using ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE for equipment maintenance for 3 years. Their responsiveness and technical expertise allow us to maintain maximum productivity and avoid production stoppages.
testimonials.t3_text: The team perfectly managed the electrification of our new production unit. Careful work, respect for budget and deadlines. I highly recommend ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE for any industrial project.
testimonials.t4_text: Excellent industrial partner. Preventive maintenance performed by their teams has considerably reduced our production stoppages. A very cost-effective investment with truly competent teams.
testimonials.t5_text: ACHRAF INDUSTRIELLE carried out our food processing installations with special attention to hygienic and sanitary standards. Remarkable quality of work and very professional teams.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quickly find answers to all your questions
faq.q1: What industrial sectors do you cover?
faq.a1: We work in many industrial sectors: food processing, textile, chemistry, construction, logistics, automotive and many others. Our versatile teams adapt to the technical specificities of each sector to provide you with an optimal response.
faq.a2: Yes, we operate throughout Morocco. Our main base is in Marrakech, but we have mobile teams capable of intervening in all major cities and industrial zones of the Kingdom, from Tangier to Agadir.
faq.a3: You can request a free quote via our online form on this site, by email at aaachchak@gmail.com, or by calling us at +212 697601775. Our sales team will respond within 24 hours with a detailed and personalized proposal.
faq.a4: Response times vary depending on the nature of the project. For maintenance emergencies, we intervene within 4 hours for clients under contract. For construction or installation projects, deadlines are contractually defined in the specifications and rigorously respected.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer annual maintenance contracts adapted to your equipment. These contracts include scheduled preventive visits, priority for emergency interventions, monitoring of your equipment status and detailed monthly reporting.
faq.q6: What guarantees do you offer on your work?
faq.a6: All our work is guaranteed with conformity certificates. Warranty periods vary by type of service: minimum 1 year for electrical installations, 2 years for metal constructions, with possible extensions. We contractually commit to quality and durability.
